MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-09-486336 WITH CASE CGC-08-480216
Off Calendar Jun-02-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: CROSS DEFENDANT CHRISTINE SPAGNUOLO'S MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-09-486336 WITH CASE CGC-08-480216. No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Granted. No opposition filed. Matter is consolidated for all purposes with Case No. 486336. Lead case No. is 480216. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) (302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR 5759
